title: Arts. 1113 to 1132 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 3--OF THE APPOINTMENT OF CURATORS TO

SUCCESSIONS, AND OF THE SECURITY THEY ARE

BOUND TO GIVE

Art. 1113.  Arts. 1113 to 1132 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
